current.text: Wiring the service-mode hardening guide for Friday's customer.

recent.text: Replaced the platforms dropdown — 8 platforms in a 387px panel with distinct icons per form factor.
Shipped the complete AIO/GEO/SEO stack — llms.txt, robots.txt with 30+ AI bot Allow rules, Organization JSON-LD, per-page Product/Service schemas.
Fixed iOS Safari video autoplay — autoplay attribute now in static HTML, added webkit-playsinline, background-mode wrapper fills parent.
Diagnosed the dark-mode nextSibling crash — ThemeToggle's v-if/v-else rendered different DOM between SSR and CSR.
